context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct fraud/spam flag conditions, the specific decision rules mapping flags to moderation outcomes, the automated 15-minute moderation queue, correct aggregate rating calculation, and CDN cache invalidation.

checklist.name: High-frequency flag
checklist.description: Raises 'high-frequency' flag when a customer has submitted more than 3 reviews within the past 1 hour

checklist.name: Suspicious IP flag
checklist.description: Raises 'suspicious-ip' flag when more than 5 reviews have come from the same IP address within the past 7 days

checklist.name: Too-short body flag
checklist.description: Raises 'too-short' flag when review body is fewer than 20 characters (NOT the same as the submission validation minimum of 10)

checklist.name: Repetitive characters flag
checklist.description: Raises a repetitive-characters (or equivalent) flag using a regex that detects 4 or more consecutive identical characters (e.g., /(.){4,}/ or /(.\1{3,})/)

checklist.name: Incentive-disclosure-risk flag
checklist.description: Raises 'incentive-disclosure-risk' flag ONLY when rating is 5 AND the body contains the word 'discount' (case-insensitive)

checklist.name: Profanity check
checklist.description: Calls checkProfanity (or equivalent profanity API/word-list) on the review body and adds a 'profanity' flag if found

checklist.name: Rejected decision rule
checklist.description: Returns 'rejected' (only) when flags include 'profanity' OR 'high-frequency' — not for other flags alone

checklist.name: Needs-human-review rule
checklist.description: Returns 'needs-human-review' when flags are present but neither 'profanity' nor 'high-frequency' is among them

checklist.name: avgRating precision
checklist.description: avgRating is rounded/formatted to exactly 1 decimal place (toFixed(1) or Math.round to 1 decimal) before saving

checklist.name: Published reviews only
checklist.description: Aggregate rating calculation filters to only reviews with status 'published' (excludes pending, needs-human-review, rejected)

checklist.name: CDN cache invalidation
checklist.description: refreshProductRatingAggregate calls invalidateProductCache (or equivalent) after updating the product rating

checklist.name: 15-minute moderation schedule
checklist.description: MODERATION_RULES.md or code sets up the moderation queue to run automatically every 15 minutes (via cron, setInterval, or queue scheduler with 15-minute interval)

checklist.name: Photo incentive on approval
checklist.description: When a review is approved and has a pending incentive, a unique discount code is created and a thank-you email is sent to the reviewer
